subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Wise hath sent down from the heaven of Command unto him that hath believed in the One, the All-Informed. When thou didst drink from the cup [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الحکیم من سماء الامر لمن آمن بالفرد الخبیر انک اذا شربت من کاس
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
